title: 360 equirect push geometry (L7 LEAD)
goal: 360_Push 14.28 dB -> LEAD for the S6-360 band family. The low members (Push/Slide/Divide/Wipe) share an equirect push/crossfade geometry and show a smooth mid-transition U-dip (two panorama halves positioned differently than GT, confirmed f12). Decode the equirect push OFFSET in compositor/transition360.ts vs GT. Circle_Wipe(22.9)/Gaussian_Blur(23.6) are the good members to diff against. DoD: mid-transition U-dip closed, gate net-positive.
